sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74475" key="o)pisqo/detos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀπισθό-δετος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n74475.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bound behind</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">backwards,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:177" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">177</biblScope> </bibl> (= <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simm.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
